title: Eden thrives at the Interprovincial Water Polo Tournament in Gqeberha
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - The SWPSA Interprovincial Water Polo Tournament, hosted in Gqeberha in December 2023 and comprising the top water polo players in the country representing their provinces at various age groups, witnessed an impressive display of teamwork and determination from Eden District, which sent four teams to compete in various age groups.


> Pictured is Eden u.14 co-captain Mela Loubser in action against Zimbabwe.


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
